text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City becomes aware of her reputation
through her friend Tosen Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fans seem excited by her prospects,
particularly the possibility of her aiming for the
Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She receives support even from her manager, who
was initially reluctant about her becoming a
runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unexpected positive reaction from everyone
provides a boost to her morale.
